blocks.text: Consent of Independent Registered Public Accounting Firm We hereby consent to the use in the prospectus constituting a part of this Registration Statement of our report dated March 27, 2026, relating to the financial statements of Yesway, Inc., which is contained in that prospectus.
We also consent to the reference to us under the caption “Experts” in the prospectus.
/s/ BDO USA, P.C. Boston, Massachusetts March 27, 2026
